ai_summary: Here is the executive summary:  Advent Hotels International Limited has finalized an Investment Agreement to sell a 50% equity stake in its wholly-owned subsidiary, Advent Convention and Hotels International Limited (ACHIL), to Prestige Estates Projects Limited for Rs. 504 Crores. This transaction converts ACHIL into a 50:50 joint venture, formalizing a prior framework agreement for the joint commercial development of a strategic land parcel in Mumbai. The deal injects significant capital into Advent Hotels and brings in a strategic partner for a major real estate project, with no apparent red flags in the disclosed information.
